name: io.github.kivanccakmak/yaver
title: Yaver
description: Phone-first local dev MCP for Claude Code and Codex: install Yaver, pair mobile, run, build, deploy.

environmentVariables.name: YAVER_HEADLESS
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to force device-code OAuth instead of opening a browser (useful in remote / WSL / sandboxed environments).

highlights: Resumable headless OAuth: the device-code flow survives agent tool-call timeouts without re-prompting the human.
Auto-registers in Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, and Zed on first sign-in.
Phone-to-dev-machine P2P control plane with MCP tools for hot reload, builds, deploys, git, tunnels, and sessions.
Works with any coding agent — provider-agnostic by design.
